items.title: Google is signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content.
items.description: Signing the code reinforces our commitment to transparency and responsible AI development in Europe.
items.content: Signing the code reinforces our commitment to transparency and responsible AI development in Europe.
items.author: Karen Massin
